Details: Added user_team_memberships & user_managers junction tables. Employee can report to multiple leads and work in multiple teams.
Leads request team/manager changes → Admin approves/rejects. New team_change_requests table.
All services (attendance, GTL, leaves, WFH) now filter by managerId for leads. Leads see ONLY their reportees.
Shows multi-team + multi-manager. Leads see reportees only. Request flow for team/manager changes.
Leads see MY TEAM MANAGEMENT section. Admins see full ADMINISTRATION. No data leaks.
Auto-loads for leads. Shows today's attendance (who checked in/out/absent). Attendance summary table. Issue detection cards.
Shows team roster with live attendance. Highlights members with pending entries. Click to expand.
Leads see only reportees in assign modals. No more all-company dropdowns.
Leads see only reportees' requests. No 'New Request' button on admin view.
Moved to lead section. Backend scoped to reportees via managerId.
Added parentId to teams table. Software → AI/ML, Backend, ODOO etc. Visual hierarchy on Teams page.
Click edit → change roles, teams, managers, reportees. Lead config section appears when Team Lead role selected.
Every change logged: team_added, team_removed, manager_added, manager_removed, roles, status, designation. Shows who changed what and when.
Card-based layout. Date+Attendance+Hours card at top. Hours strictly from attendance (read-only). Better weekend/absent/missed-checkout messages.
Backend rejects time entries where hours > actual attendance. Blocks missed checkout entries. Anti-gaming enforced.
CSS variables per company. Sidebar background matches brand. AngularSpring=burgundy, PowerSoft19=orange, Venturetronics=red, Raythorne=navy.
~30 pages converted to React.lazy(). Initial bundle reduced 230KB. Faster first load.
Removed from employee sidebar. Moved under admin People section.
Sub-team filter, list/card view toggle, RFID column for admins.
Click any team to see its members. Works for parent teams and sub-teams.
Shows leave balance card (allowed/used/remaining). Days counter. Themed form.
3 views: Tree hierarchy, List view, Department view. Search + filter by manager. Color-coded levels.
Select employee → formatted CV with personal info, education, experience, languages. Print/Save as PDF.
Add Device button + modal. Name, IP, description. Previously could only edit existing devices.
Role-specific FAQ. Employee/Lead/Admin guides. Feature comparison table.
Full Swagger UI at /api/docs. Password protected (admin/gtl@2026). 103 endpoints documented with examples.
Port 4000 bound to 127.0.0.1 only. All traffic through frontend proxy on 3002. Swagger password protected.
Sortable columns (name, ID, team, designation). Phone/RFID/Edit hidden for non-super-admins.
Single Users page with Phone + RFID columns. Profiles page removed from sidebar.
Profile jobTitle auto-syncs when designation changes. One field, not two.
erd.png (34 tables), frontend-structure.png, backend-structure.png generated as PNG.
Company-branded dashboard with attendance chart, GTL summary donut, team stats. Different views for employee vs lead vs admin.
Add Chart.js/Recharts: attendance trends (line), hours per project (pie), team performance (bar), monthly comparison.
Replace all 10 $queryRawUnsafe calls with parameterized queries. Security audit.
Send email on: leave approved/rejected, attendance request approved, WFH assigned. Nodemailer + SMTP.
Camera capture or file upload for profile pictures. Show in directory, org chart, CV.
Super admin can upload Excel file to bulk-update employee profiles (CNIC, phone, blood group, education).
Auto-sync ZKTeco devices every 5 minutes. Auto-close missed checkouts at midnight. Scheduled reports.
Test and fix all pages on mobile/tablet. Sidebar collapses properly. Forms stack vertically.
Nginx config, SSL certificate, PM2 process manager, PostgreSQL backup cron, environment variables.
Test all flows: employee login → data entry → timesheet. Lead login → approvals → insights. Admin login → user management.
